setup: Why did the bitcoiner bring a ladder to the bar?
punchline: Because the drinks were on the next block!

setup: What did the bitcoin miner say to the mountain?
punchline: I need to find the right hash!

setup: Why do bitcoiners never get cold?
punchline: Because they have plenty of hash power!

setup: What is a bitcoiner's favorite dance move?
Why was the bitcoin transaction so calm?
What did Satoshi say when asked about his identity?
punchline: I plead the fifth... amendment key!

setup: Why did the altcoin go to therapy?
punchline: Because it had an identity crisis every hard fork!

setup: How does a bitcoiner greet people?
punchline: Hey there, have you heard about our lord and savior, the genesis block?
